name: Warm Bridge Gap
description: The person has some trustworthy ties, but may lack enough bridge ties into new opportunity fields.
life_effect: Insight exists, but opportunity conversion depends on entering new rooms, not only thinking better.

name: Reputation Without Distribution
description: The person is trusted by existing people but has not yet converted trust into wider visibility.
life_effect: A public artifact or small external collaboration can turn private credibility into social mobility.

name: Circle Ceiling
description: The current circle reinforces the current identity more than the future identity.
life_effect: Without a new reference group, the person may keep measuring the future with the old circle's standards.

name: Observer Network Ready
description: There is enough witnessing capacity to test a new self without relying only on private judgment.
life_effect: The safest next move is to expose a small prototype to people who can tell the truth.
